contentTypes.name: Accordion
contentTypes.description: A collapsible container that displays multiple expandable items, perfect for FAQs, product information, or any content that needs to be organized in a space-efficient way.

contentTypes.name: AccordionItem
contentTypes.description: A single expandable item within an accordion. Each item has a title that users click to reveal or hide the content inside.

contentTypes.name: Button
contentTypes.description: An interactive button that can link to other pages or trigger actions. Use buttons for call-to-action elements like "Add to Cart", "Learn More", or "Contact Us".

validations.message: The url must be a valid URL or relative Path

contentTypes.name: Divider
contentTypes.description: A spacing element that creates visual separation between content sections. Use dividers to break up long pages and improve readability.

contentTypes.name: Grid
contentTypes.description: A flexible layout tool that arranges content in columns. Perfect for creating side-by-side layouts, product grids, or any organized content arrangement.

contentTypes.name: Image
contentTypes.description: Displays an image with responsive behavior, showing different images on mobile and desktop if needed. Images automatically optimize for performance.

contentTypes.name: Link
contentTypes.description: A clickable link that can wrap around other content (like images or text). Use this to make entire sections clickable, not just buttons.

validations.message: The url must be a valid URL or relative Path

contentTypes.name: Page
contentTypes.description: The main page component that contains all page content and SEO settings. This is typically the root component for any page.

contentTypes.name: Rich Text
contentTypes.description: A flexible text editor that supports formatting, links, lists, and headings. Use this for longer-form content that needs rich formatting options.

validations.message: Only bold, italic, and underline marks are allowed
Only heading 1, heading 2, heading 3, ordered list, unordered list, link to asset, link to entry, and link to Url nodes are allowed

contentTypes.name: Section
contentTypes.description: A container component that groups related content together. Sections can have backgrounds, padding, and alignment options. Think of it as a "box" for organizing content.

validations.message: The background color must match a hex color code. E.g #32AB0F

contentTypes.name: Slider
contentTypes.description: A horizontal slider/carousel that displays multiple items one at a time. Users can swipe or use navigation arrows to browse through items.

contentTypes.name: Text
contentTypes.description: A simple text element that can display as a heading or paragraph. Use this for short text content that doesn't need rich formatting.

contentTypes.name: Video
contentTypes.description: Displays a video with a preview image. The video can autoplay or require user interaction to start.

contentTypes.name: Product Listing Page
contentTypes.description: A specialized page component for product category/listing pages. It includes both teaser content (shown at the top) and SEO content (shown at the bottom).

contentTypes.name: Recently Viewed Products
contentTypes.description: Automatically displays products that the current user has recently viewed. Great for personalization and encouraging return visits to products.

contentTypes.name: Product Slider
contentTypes.description: Displays a horizontal slider of products. Perfect for showcasing featured products, related items, or curated collections.

contentTypes.name: Smart Sorting Product Slider
contentTypes.description: A product slider that automatically selects and displays products using smart sorting algorithms. Perfect for showing personalized or algorithm-driven product recommendations.

settings.helpText: Optional heading displayed above all accordion items.
List of accordion items that users can expand or collapse.
The clickable heading that users click to expand or collapse this accordion item.
Content that appears when this accordion item is expanded. Hidden by default.
Visual appearance of the button. Defaults to Primary.
The text displayed on the button.
The destination link when the button is clicked. Supports internal pages or external URLs.
Whether to open the link in a new browser tab or not.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Amount of vertical spacing. Defaults to Small.
When enabled, displays a horizontal line. When disabled, creates only empty space.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Number of columns displayed on desktop and tablet screens.
Number of columns displayed on mobile devices.
Horizontal spacing between columns on mobile. Defaults to None.
Horizontal spacing between columns on mobile. Defaults to None.
Vertical spacing between rows on desktop. Defaults to None.
Vertical spacing between rows on mobile. Defaults to None.
Vertical alignment of content within grid cells. Defaults to Middle.
Horizontal alignment of content within grid cells. Defaults to Center.
Content items to display in the grid. Each item appears in its own grid cell.
Image displayed on desktop and tablet. Used on mobile if no mobile image is provided.
Image proportions on desktop. Defaults to Original.
Image displayed on mobile devices. If not provided, desktop image is used.
Image proportions on mobile. Defaults to Original.
Text description of the image for accessibility and SEO.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Destination link when clicked. Supports internal pages or external URLs.
Whether to open the link in a new browser tab or not.
Content that becomes clickable (images, text, or other components).
Serves as internal title only and will not be displayed. It will however be used to generate the page slug.
The manually set URL slug for this CMS page. Uses the title to generate the slug automatically if not set manually.
Page title for browser tabs and search results. Keep under 60 characters for SEO.
Brief page description for search results. Keep under 160 characters.
Controls how search engines index this page. Defaults to index/follow.
Main page content. Add sections, images, text, and other components here.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Formatted text content with support for headings, bold, italic, lists, and links.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Background color for the section using a hex color code. Leave empty for transparent.
Background image for desktop. Appears behind all section content.
Background image for mobile. If not provided, desktop image is used.
Amount of space inside the section around content. Defaults to None.
Minimum section height on desktop in pixels.
Minimum section height on mobile in pixels. Uses desktop value if not provided.
Vertical alignment of content within the section. Defaults to Middle.
Horizontal alignment of content within the section. Defaults to Center.
All content inside this section. Add any combination of components.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
Items to display in the slider. Each item appears as a separate slide.
When enabled, displays left and right arrow buttons for navigation. Defaults to enabled.
When enabled, displays dots at the bottom showing active slide. Defaults to enabled.
HTML element type for the text. Defaults to paragraph.
The text to display.
Internal name for editors to identify this component within Contentful. Not displayed in frontend.
The video file to display.
Thumbnail image shown before video plays on desktop.
Thumbnail image for mobile. If not provided, desktop image is used.
Shape and proportions of the video player. Defaults to 16:9.
When enabled, video starts automatically on page load. Defaults to enabled.
When enabled, video plays without sound. Defaults to enabled.
When enabled, video restarts automatically when it ends. Defaults to enabled.
When enabled, displays video player controls. Defaults to disabled.
The relative URL slug to the specific Product Listing Page, e.g. "c/c-123456".
Content displayed at the top of the product listing page, above the product grid.
Content displayed at the bottom of the product listing page, after the product grid. Useful for SEO.
Amount of space around the component. Defaults to None.
Heading displayed above the product slider.
SCAYLE Storefront Smart Sorting Key (algorithm) used to automatically select and sort products.
Heading displayed above the product slider.
Limit products to a specific category by entering the category ID number.
Limit products to a specific brand by entering the brand ID number.
Maximum number of products to display in the slider.
